heading: Application to new and existing preclearance operations
label: 4436 Application to new and existing preclearance operations
text: Except for sections 814(d) [], 815, 817 [], and 818, this subchapter shall only apply to the establishment of preclearance operations in a foreign country in which no preclearance operations have been established as of .19 U.S.C. 4433(d)19 U.S.C. 4435February 24, 2016
notes: References in TextSections 815 and 818, referred to in text, are sections 815 and 818 of . Section 815 amended , Transportation. Section 818 amended , Agriculture, and , Aliens and Nationality.Pub. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 114–125section 4301 of this title
